message:
fix(gemini): emit proper ToolCallStart/ToolCallDelta/ToolCallEnd stream events

The Gemini provider was only emitting Start and ToolCallDelta events for
function calls, never emitting ToolCallStart or ToolCallEnd. This caused
tool call tests to report tool_calls=0 since tool calls are counted via
ToolCallEnd events.

Also fixed a bug where process_candidate returned early on the first part,
causing multiple function calls in a single candidate (e.g., gemini sending
two tool calls at once) to lose all but the first.

Refactored to use pending_events queue (matching OpenAI provider pattern):
- Stream unfold loop drains pending_events before polling SSE
- process_candidate queues all events instead of returning early
- Text parts now emit TextDelta for every chunk (including the first)
- Removed unused ToolCallState struct and current_text field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
